history..write: auth != null && (root.child('tpm_system/users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || root.child('tpm_system/users/' + auth.uid).val() === 'admin' || root.child('tpm_system/users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'auditor' || root.child('tpm_system/users/' + auth.uid).val() === 'auditor')

$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || root.child('tpm_system/users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || root.child('tpm_system/users/' + auth.uid).val() === 'admin')
